case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF S.F. TAX COLL/BDR VS. YOLANDA GONZALEZ

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-10-2009 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF S.F. TAX COLL/BDR AS TO DEFENDANT GONZALEZ, YOLANDA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-02-2008 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-02-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-02-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF S.F. TAX COLL/BDR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GONZALEZ, YOLANDA $5,100.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,150.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $50.50) SERVED OCT-03-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GONZALEZ, YOLANDA
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-10-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-10-2009 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-02-2008 - CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES TO FEB-10-2009 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PARTIES TO CONFER CONCERNING POSSIBLE MEDI-CAL COVERAGE. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
